description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a dark gray coloration and a rugged, angular surface. The stone features a variety of natural fractures, creases, and subtle textural variations, giving it a weathered and authentic appearance. Its surface is predominantly matte with some slightly smoother patches, but overall it maintains a rough tactile quality. The stone's form is asymmetrical, with one side appearing broader and flatter while the opposite side tapers to a more pointed edge. There are no visible artificial markings or modifications, suggesting it is a naturally occurring rock. Its size and mass make it suitable as a physical barrier or obstacle in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or landscaped areas.
description: A dark gray, rugged stone with an irregular, angular shape and a rough, weathered surface. Its natural fractures and matte finish give it an authentic, unmodified appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the stone, highlighting its rough texture and prominent surface creases.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a more tapered, pointed end and deeper shadowed crevices, emphasizing the stone's asymmetry.
description_view_2: Here, the stone's side appears more rounded, with visible surface undulations and a less pronounced point.
description_view_3: This view presents the stone's flattest and most uniform face, with subtle textural details and fewer deep crevices.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular natural veining and fracturing with no artificial carvings; the pattern is random and organic, enhancing the stone's rugged look.
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly eroded, with visible surface wear indicating moderate exposure to the elements but no significant moss or lichen growth.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts moderately with manicured urban features but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by grass or soil.
